input.prompt: Run the Doctor track and report status. The parent serial tail owns PR side effects and must keep final backstop -> packet generation -> validate-pr-packet.sh -> gh pr create ordering.
Run the Code Review track and report findings. Do not create or repair PRs; invalid reviewer packets block before PR creation in the parent serial tail.

Run verify -> verify-tasks -> integration sequentially, then report the evidence path. The parent serial tail consumes this evidence before generated packets are validated and before every gh pr create --base --head --title --body-file.

content.content: Reduced parser fixture response for general-purpose (Doctor): parent serial tail retains packet validation ownership.
Reduced parser fixture response for general-purpose (Code Review): no post-create packet repair fallback.
Reduced parser fixture response for general-purpose (Verify Chain): verification evidence precedes validate-pr-packet.sh and gh pr create --base --head --title --body-file.
